basic_details.job_title: Chhattisgarh High Court Civil Judge Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Chhattisgarh High Court Recruitment 2026: Chhattisgarh High Court has released the official notification for 5 Civil Judge (Senior Division) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking legal jobs.

qualification.education_qualification: Civil Judge (Junior Division) with not less than three years of qualifying service.
qualification.details: Civil Judge (Senior Division): Must be a Civil Judge (Junior Division) with not less than three years of qualifying service.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Chhattisgarh High Court Civil Judge (Senior Division) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Chhattisgarh High Court Civil Judge (Senior Division) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Chhattisgarh High Court Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Chhattisgarh High Court Civil Judge (Senior Division) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Chhattisgarh High Court Civil Judge (Senior Division) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Chhattisgarh High Court Civil Judge (Senior Division) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Civil Judge (Senior Division) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Civil Judge (Senior Division) position in the Chhattisgarh High Court.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Civil Judges (Junior Division) with at least three years of qualifying service to be eligible for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. An advance copy can be sent directly to the Registrar General.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Civil Judge (Senior Division) role?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a Limited Competitive Examination, which includes Paper-I (Law), Performance Appraisal, and a Viva Voce.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Chhattisgarh High Court recruitment is 01 / S & A Cell / 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Which city is the recruitment based in?
faq.answer: The recruitment is based in Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a deputation job type, meaning candidates will be appointed on deputation.

faq.question: Q10. When is the examination date for the Civil Judge (Senior Division) post?
faq.answer: The examination date for the Civil Judge (Senior Division) post is scheduled for 20 September 2026.
